title: SpaceX is gearing up for Starship's 13th test flight later this week
summary: SpaceX is preparing for Starship's 13th test flight, which will subject the rocket to higher stress levels and deploy new Starlink satellites in orbit. This milestone represents continued progress toward making Starship operational for commercial missions.
content: This flight will put Starship under higher pressure and test out new Starlink satellites in orbit.

zh.title: SpaceX为Starship第13次测试飞行做准备
zh.summary: SpaceX正在为Starship的第13次测试飞行做准备，此次飞行将使火箭承受更高的压力，并在轨道上部署新的Starlink卫星。这个里程碑代表了向使Starship具备商业任务运营能力迈进的持续进展。

title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”
summary: Uber's Chief Product Officer discusses the company's strategic expansion into hotels, robotaxis, and AI-powered rider services while emphasizing the company won't pursue every market. The interview reveals Uber's complex relationship with autonomous vehicle partner Waymo and its new data-focused AV Labs operation.
content: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal walks TechCrunch through the company's financial-services ambitions, its increasingly complicated relationship with Waymo, its new AV Labs data operation, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and drivers will actually notice.

zh.title: Uber产品负责人谈论酒店、机器人出租车以及公司为何不想成为"万能企业"
zh.summary: Uber首席产品官讨论了公司在酒店、机器人出租车和AI驱动乘客服务方面的战略扩展，同时强调公司不会涉足所有市场。采访揭示了Uber与自动驾驶合作伙伴Waymo的复杂关系，以及其新的以数据为中心的AV Labs业务。

title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
summary: Video-generation startup PixVerse has raised $439 million in funding, pushing its valuation past $2 billion. The company plans to expand its world model capabilities and grow its customer base across new geographic markets.
content: With the cash, the company aims to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.

zh.title: 视频生成初创公司PixVerse融资4.39亿美元，估值突破20亿美元大关
zh.summary: 视频生成初创公司PixVerse完成4.39亿美元融资，估值已超过20亿美元。该公司计划扩展其世界模型能力，并在新的地理市场扩大客户基础。
